description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a white picket fence. The front yard features a green lawn, stepping stones leading to the main entrance, and two large leafy trees flanking the walkway. The house has a small covered porch with a decorative wreath on the door and a bench to one side. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The roof is multi-gabled, adding architectural interest and depth to the structure. The overall setting suggests a cozy, family-oriented home typical of quiet residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white house with a gray gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows, set behind a picket fence and flanked by two large trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's gable roof, white walls, and dense tree coverage on the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, porch, symmetrical windows, stepping stone path, and two large trees framing the yard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the house partially obscured by trees, showing the roof and side wall.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the house, roof structure, and the two large trees positioned behind the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small covered porch, decorative wreath, steps, and flanked by columns and a white picket fence.
